overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City. The character descends from a plaza into a busy commercial street with neon signs, crosses through traffic, and passes an NCPD officer while exploring the dense urban environment at dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza transitioning to covered pedestrian walkway

events.description: character descends wide stone stairs from plaza level to street
reaches flat sidewalk and continues under elevated transit structure

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs from an elevated plaza and continuing along the pedestrian walkway

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at green and yellow kiosk
pedestrian in purple shirt walking along sidewalk

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with red stone borders descending from plaza
large palm tree in rectangular concrete planter
green and yellow food stall with illuminated menu displays
massive overhead railway or walkway structure with metal beams
orange metal railings separating walkway from street

segments.scene_description: The character begins at the top of a wide stone staircase in an urban plaza, descending past a potted palm tree toward street level. Upon reaching the bottom, the character passes a green and yellow food vendor kiosk and continues along a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated transit structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated transit line

events.description: steps off curb and moves into street level among vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk, passing other pedestrians, then moving into the street

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past on the street
pedestrian with red hair and green pants walking ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated digital displays on building facades showing advertisements
yellow and black striped safety posts along curb
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated transit structure, the character moves along a covered sidewalk lined with orange safety barriers and neon billboards. The character approaches a crosswalk, then steps off the curb into the street among moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy street with moving traffic and police presence

events.description: navigates between moving vehicles including a gold pickup truck
view temporarily blocked by large red van passing by
returns to sidewalk after crossing through traffic

agents.ego_description: moving through traffic on the street, passing close to vehicles, then returning to sidewalk and passing an NCPD officer

notable_agents.action: gold pickup truck driving slowly in traffic
NCPD police officer in tactical armor standing at corner

entered.detail: large gold and brown pickup truck with covered bed
red commercial van with white roof driving past
police officer wearing NCPD uniform and cap
blue solar panel array over store entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves through dense traffic at street level, weaving between a gold pickup truck and a red delivery van. After navigating the vehicles, the character returns to the sidewalk and passes an NCPD police officer standing near a storefront with solar panel awnings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial intersection with heavy signage

events.description: approaches traffic light at intersection corner

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk toward an intersection, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red cap and black tank top walking toward camera

entered.detail: vertical traffic light showing red signal
storefront with green neon lighting and signage
multi-story building covered in digital billboards

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the dense commercial sidewalk, the character approaches an intersection with a red traffic light. The street is lined with tall buildings covered in digital billboards, and the character passes a storefront with distinctive green neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet urban plaza down into the neon-drenched chaos of a dense commercial district. It begins at the top of a wide stone staircase, descending past a potted palm tree and a colorful food kiosk before moving beneath the shadow of an elevated transit structure. As the character progresses along a covered sidewalk lined with orange safety barriers and glowing billboards, the scene shifts from the pedestrian walkway into the middle of a busy street. The camera then weaves through moderate traffic, passing a gold pickup truck and a red delivery van before returning to the sidewalk to pass an NCPD officer stationed near solar panel awnings. Finally, the environment opens up into a towering intersection of digital billboards and green neon storefronts as the character approaches a red traffic light.
